currentLinkedIn.headline: Head of Legal & Compliance at Solaris SE | Fintech · PSD2 · GDPR | Frankfurt
currentLinkedIn.about: I build compliance programmes that enable business growth rather than block it. Eleven years in fintech legal — from startup licensing to enterprise regulatory frameworks across 12 EU jurisdictions.

experience.title: Head of Legal & Compliance
bullets: Led regulatory strategy for EU Banking-as-a-Service platform operating across 12 EEA markets
Secured PSD2 payment institution licence in Germany, Ireland, and the Netherlands within 14 months
Designed GDPR compliance programme covering 8M+ data subjects; passed BaFin audit with zero findings

experience.title: Senior Legal Counsel
bullets: Drafted and negotiated 200+ commercial agreements with banks, card networks, and technology partners
Advised C-suite on AML obligations across 40 operating entities in 26 countries
